item.title: Cloudera 与 VAST Data 宣布建立战略合作伙伴关系，共同提供人工智能数据平台
item.summary: Combining Cloudera’s next-generation lakehouse data services with VAST’s AI Operating System, leveraging the NVIDIA AI Data Platform reference design, this joint solution eliminates GPU starvation and accelerates enterprise AI Combining Cloudera’s next-generation lakehouse data services with VAST’s AI Operating System,
